calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Amount Demanded: $30865.78
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER ADVANTAGE ASSETS INC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Amount Demanded: $30865.78 IS DENIED FOR INVALID SERVICE. Prevailing party may prepare a form of order. (301/DEW) Judge: Diane Elan Wick, Reporter: Candace Yount CSR# 2737
